channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: After three years of war, what is the situation like in Sudan?
item.description: Sudan’s war has displaced millions and caused thousands of deaths, with no clear end in sight to the ongoing violence.

item.title: Ukraine strikes drone production, military support deal with Germany
item.description: Germany will get access to Ukraine's cutting-edge drone expertise in return for extra help in war against Russia.

item.title: Why are the US, Iran arguing over duration of uranium enrichment ban?
item.description: The US reportedly wants Iran to stop enriching for 20 years. Iran has agreed to five years. Here's why that matters.

item.title: Can Pakistan juggle US-Iran mediation with Saudi defence commitments?
item.description: Pakistani officials and a number of analysts say it can do both. But the balancing act won't be easy.

item.title: Iran remains an obstacle to the ‘Greater Israel’ project
item.description: Israel wants to expand in the Middle East. Its failure to defeat Iran is a major setback for its hegemonic plans.

item.title: How much will US Hormuz blockade hurt Iran, and does Tehran have an escape?
item.description: Iran earned $5bn in oil exports in past month while it shut the strait for most other ships. That revenue is at risk.

item.title: How many ships have passed the Strait of Hormuz and how many were attacked?
item.description: Ship-tracking data shows 279 ships have passed through the strait and 22 have been attacked since the war on Iran began.

item.title: Who controls the Strait of Hormuz?
item.description: A US move to block the strait has intensified a broader struggle over who controls access and under what terms.

item.title: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
item.description: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.

item.title: US blockade of Iran ports irresponsible and dangerous, China says
item.description: China, the biggest buyer of Iranian oil, says the US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire".
